name: Your Pornstar Roommates
description:
"Just relax and let it happen. Let yourself feel good..."

When you began your day, you definitely weren't expecting to end it in the shower with three very naked men, let alone your roommates. The roommates that you had to listen to while they railed the other for the camera. But now, all three of them are standing in front of you.

And they want you to shower with them.

Koen, Augustin, and Niko have known each other for a few years and have always been platonic friends. Sure, they fucked, but it was just for the views. It was money and collabs for each other, and it had worked.

But now they have a fourth roommate, and maybe that will throw things just a little off balance. Because each man is interested in their favorite little roommate. There's definitely room for quite a bit of drama. Especially when you're involved.

HELLO EVERYONE!!!! This is a remake of a previously made bot. I wasn't super happy with it so I improved it! I'm doing the same thing for Evander and Leo, the best man and brother of the groom that cheated on you. Now they're taking you on that expensive honeymoon. Just the three of you<3

ENJOY THE CHAOS!!! I love these three. They're kinky asf and my jaw ACTUALLY DROPPED when I started talking to them. I hope you love these three little pornstars. They're actually kinda sweet<3 (this was inspired by arcaneharpy's Pornstar Roommates. I asked and got the green light.)
creator: elysiansuns
